2605.29742.title: Citation-Closure Retrieval and Per-Rule Attribution for Real-World Regulatory Compliance Question Answering
2605.29742.paper_summary: Deploying Large Language Models (LLMs) for regulatory compliance demands rigorous traceability via comprehensive citations across multi-tiered authority structures. Unlike traditional multi-hop or legal QA, this task requires structured procedural lookups and evidence-set closure rather than entity resolution or case-law reasoning. Existing RAG systems struggle here due to flattened citation edges, fragmented retrieval expansions, and fragile post-hoc attribution. We formalize Regulatory Compliance QA with RegOps-Bench, a novel benchmark featuring an Operational Knowledge Graph derived from complex national R\&D regulations. To address these bottlenecks, we propose RefWalk, a unified framework driven by a shared topic anchor. RefWalk traverses cross-document citations, fuses multi-view candidates via max-based aggregation, and enforces per-rule attribution to explicitly map claims to sources. We establish a strong baseline with substantial improvements in retrieval recall and citation accuracy. Finally, a contrastive evaluation on a U.S. health compliance dataset (HIPAA) reveals that existing systems exhibit saturation on flat-structure rules, underscoring the need for RegOps-Bench. Our code is available at https://github.com/yeongjoonJu/RefWalk.
2605.29742.paper_summary_zh: 部署大型語言模型（LLMs）以符合監管要求需要透過多層次權威結構的全面引用來實現嚴格的可追溯性。與傳統的多跳或法律問答不同，這項任務需要結構化的程序查詢和證據集的關閉，而不是實體解析或案例法推理。現有的RAG系統在這方面面臨挑戰，因為引用邊緣被扁平化，檢索擴展碎片化，以及事後歸因脆弱。我們通過RegOps-Bench正式化監管合規性問答，這是一個新穎的基準，特徵是源自複雜國家研發法規的操作知識圖譜。為了解決這些瓶頸，我們提出RefWalk，一個由共享主題錨點驅動的統一框架。RefWalk遍歷跨文檔引用，通過基於最大值的聚合融合多視角候選，並強制每條規則的歸因，以明確將主張映射到來源。我們建立了一個強大的基準，顯著提高了檢索回憶率和引用準確性。最後，對美國健康合規數據集（HIPAA）的對比評估顯示，現有系統在扁平結構規則上出現飽和，突顯了RegOps-Bench的必要性。我們的代碼可在https://github.com/yeongjoonJu/RefWalk獲得。
2605.29742.author: Yeong-Joon Ju et.al.
